name: Holy Shift
short_description: This game is a psychological test in which you will face dilemmas that reveal your personality. At the end of it, you will know your psychotype.
detailed_description:
This game is ideal for YouTubers and Streamers: it allows you to create content, interact with your chatters and let your audience get to know you better! This creates a unique experience, for all parties involved. Players who play this game themselves can also enjoy the single player experience a lot!

Imagine that you are in purgatory. Imagine that a demon of lust and debauchery has spoken to you. Imagine that you are not alone there. Imagine that the fates of many people rest on your shoulders. So now don't be afraid... the Succubus doesn't bite.

  • Short and hellness;

  • Extraordinary;

  • The only game of its kind;

  • Sit back, relax, and decide your fate;

  • Six Endings;

  • Super affordable for a unique experience.

PS.

If you don't expect anything, you'll enjoy the game.
